title: Transactional Outbox, Relay, Inbox, Sagas, and Compensation · Diagnostic Repair Bay
summary: An incident engineer receives a plausible but defective outbox, relay, inbox, and compensation protocol; preserve message identity and timing, locate the first broken ownership boundary, and retain a deterministic regression case. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in outbox, relay, inbox, and compensation protocol and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evi…
objectives: Enumerate database-first, publish-first, timeout, crash, confirm-loss, rollback, and duplicate failure windows for a dual write.
Store domain mutation and immutable outbox message identity, type, payload, destination intent, and availability atomically.
Claim bounded outbox rows, publish with backpressure and confirms, mark completion safely, and recover ambiguous attempts through stable identity.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug Dual Write Failure Matrix
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug messaging team handles case 2664 in a partner publisher using an unroutable changed topic key. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to close the local dual-write gap and preserve confirm or external-effect ambiguity; keep reconnection and retry work cancellable under one deadline; then lower the byte or in-flight budget and preserve upstream rejection evidence. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Enumerate database-first, publish-first, timeout, crash, confirm-loss, rollback, and duplicate failure windows for a dual write.

Inspect the Dual Write Failure Matrix trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Publish the incident record · Debug Saga Compensation, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: A compensation always restores the world to its exact state before the original action.
